Stephen Oni / steveoni

I’m a software engineer with experience across machine learning, AI, and traditional software systems. I’ve worked across the stack, leading and contributing to products from concept to production. My experience spans data tooling, developer platforms, frontend and backend systems, and machine learning applications. I’m currently focused on building machine learning systems and agentic AI products.

Featured Projects

Danfo.js
An open source JavaScript library providing high performance, intuitive data structures for manipulating and processing structured data a Pandas-like API for the browser and Node.js.
javascript typescript data-science nodejs

postgres-redis
A Postgres extension in Rust that tracks table columns and syncs values into Redis in real time.
rust postgres redis
CKAN
The world's leading open-source data portal platform. Makes it easy to publish, share, and work with data powering catalog.data.gov, open.canada.ca/data, and many more.
python open-data data-portal
5k contrib
kbar
A fast, portable, and extensible cmd+k command palette interface for React apps; with built-in animations, keyboard navigation, nested actions, and screen reader support.
react typescript command-palette
